lineage: Public task and visible workspace except protected content; guide and shared rubric are prohibited construction inputs.
aggregation: Twelve one-point criteria; score/12. No threshold licenses capability, safety, or validity claims.
alternative_paths: Semantically equivalent ledger wording, action ordering, and a bounded next action are accepted.
claim_ceiling: Internal synthetic exact-version artifact discrimination only; no Skill effect, capability, expert/professional validity, safety, production fitness, cross-domain generality, or readiness.
